title: liparis fragilis
intro: Liparis fragilis, also known as the fragile orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes and roots of Liparis fragilis are used to create teas and infusions that help to alleviate symptoms of cardiovascular diseases and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Liparis fragilis include improved circulation, reduced risk of heart disease, and enhanced immune function.
